title: Meituan LongCat 2.0 (Tested): China's 1.6T OPEN MODEL looks CRAZY!
summary: Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with sparse attention that activates approximately 48 billion parameters per token. The model was trained for long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks on AI ASIC superpods rather than traditional GPU setups, and weights are being uploaded to Hugging Face.
writeup: The video tests LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Meituan that uses sparse attention to activate roughly 48 billion parameters per token. It matters because the model targets long-context, coding, research, and agentic tasks, and it was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than conventional GPU setups. The weights are being released as open-weights on Hugging Face.
